title: cleomella hillmanii var. hillmanii
intro: Cleomella hillmanii var. hillmanii, also known as Hillman's Cleomella, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Cleomella hillmanii var. hillmanii often involve infusions or decoctions made from the leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various ailments.
